name: Moon Caves
short_description: This is a rogue-like top-down shooter where you control a spaceship that is sent out to explore the caves on the Moon. Once you enter the caves, you find out that there are enemies. It is up to you to survive against them while also trying to find the path down to the next level of the caves.
detailed_description:
This is a rogue-like top-down shooter where you control a spaceship that is sent out to explore the caves on the Moon. But once you enter the caves, you find out that they are inhabited by hostile forces. It is up to you to survive against them while also trying to find the path down to the next level of the caves.

Features:


  • Randomly Generated Levels,
  • A Single-Player Campaign Mode,
  • An Endless Mode Where You Can See How Long You Can Survive,
  • Customizable Character Designs,
  • Achievements,
  • Subtitles,
  • Twitch Integration,
  • Speedrun Support,

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Turkish, Russian, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
